title: adenandra fragrans var. amoena
intro: Adenandra fragrans var. amoena is a fragrant, flowering plant species belonging to the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the citrus family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Adenandra fragrans var. amoena include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to make ointments and salves for topical application.
